Best Bedsheets Online Starting at ₹ 900

Giving your bedroom a new look is as easy as picking out a unique set of bedsheets from our collection. At Saral Home, our bedsheet range offers a harmonious b

Best Bedsheets Online Starting at ₹ 900

Giving your bedroom a new look is as easy as picking out a unique set of bedsheets from our collection. At Saral Home, our bedsheet range offers a harmonious b

King Size Bedsheet: This is the largest standard size and is ideal for king sized bed. The exact dimensions can vary, but they are typically designed to fit mattresses that are approximately 254x274 C
Queen Size Bedsheet: These sheets are a bit smaller than king-size sheets and are made for queen-sized beds, which are typically around 228x254 Cm (Queen Size).
Double Bed Bedsheet: This size is suitable for double or full-sized beds, which are generally 254x274 Cm (King Size).
Single Bed Sheet: As the name suggests, these are intended for single beds and are smaller in dimensions, often around 152x228 Cm.
Cotton Bedsheets: Cotton is a popular choice for bed sheets due to its softness, breathability, and durability. It is a natural fiber that becomes softer with each wash.
Microfiber Bedsheets: Microfiber bed sheets are lightweight, wrinkle-resistant, and easy to care for. They provide a smooth and silky feel at an affordable price point
Polyester Bedsheets: Polyester bed sheets are known for their strength, durability, and resistance to wrinkles. They are often blended with cotton to create a soft and comfortable fabric.
Quality by Expertise: Our bedsheets offer both comfort and durability. Saral Home bedsheets are made from soft, breathable fabrics. With this, you get a restful night’s sleep.
Handmade with Love: Each bedsheet made by Saral Home is handmade. It gives a unique­ feel to your bedroom decor. Each one of our bedshee­ts is crafted right here in India.

Versatile Designs: No matter if you like basic lines or complex damask designs, we offe­r something for everyone. Our diverse range has something for fans of minimalism and those who favor standout pa
Affordable Luxury: Our bedsheets are of high quality yet reasonably priced.
Joy Handmade Cotton Bed Sheet/Cover with 2 Pillow Covers
All Over Stripe Handmade Cotton Bed Sheet/Cover with 2 Pillow Covers
Chawla Handmade Cotton Bed Sheet/Cover with 2 Pillow Covers
Bamboo Handmade Cotton Bed Sheet/Cover with 2 Pillow Covers
Chevron Damask Cotton Bed Sheet/Cover with 2 Pillow Covers
MAJESTY Handmade Cotton Bed Sheet/Cover KING with 2 Pillow Covers
Thread count isn't everything: Don't just aim for the higher number of TC. Se­arch for a mix of comfort and durability in your bed sheets.
Choose the right material: Cotton, Linen, Silk, and Polyester are popular options. Each has its benefits and limitations. Consider how you want the sheets to feel (soft, crisp, etc.)
Weave matters: Percale is crisp, sateen is smooth, and jacquard has patterns. Choose the texture you like.
Stay Cool: Breathable fabrics like cotton and linen help you sleep better. They are especially good in warm weather.
Durability: Get sheets that last. Look for good stitching and a reliable brand. Check reviews to see how long others' sheets lasted.
Easy care: Choose bedsheets that you can wash by machine and that resist wrinkles. This will save you time.
Right size and fit: Get bedsheets that fit your mattress size and depth to avoid bunching or slipping.
Style your bedroom: Pick colors and patterns that match your bedroom decor.
In Your budget: Higher quality bed sheets may cost more but last longer. We have such good quality bedsheets at affordable rates.
Wash in cold water to prevent shrinking
Use mild detergent to preserve fabric quality
Avoid bleach to prevent color fading
Wash dark colors separately to avoid bleeding
Tumble dry on low heat to minimize wrinkles
Remove promptly from the dryer to prevent creases
Iron on low heat for a smooth finish
Store in a cool, dry place to prevent mildew
Rotate and alternate bedsheets for even wear
Follow care label instructions for the best results
